future_test_plan.name: Default config regression
future_test_plan.required_result: Original v9.1/v9.2 default safe toy config still validates and runs.

future_test_plan.name: Safe sweep profile validation
future_test_plan.required_result: At least node_count, packet_count, and step_count_limit can vary inside declared safe abstract bounds.

future_test_plan.name: Forbidden biological semantics check
future_test_plan.required_result: Reports preserve zero real biological dataset, pathogen, receptor, targeting, wet-lab, infectivity, immune evasion, and host range counts.

future_test_plan.name: Null-control leakage check
future_test_plan.required_result: All identical-variant controls produce zero ledger_effect_size leakage.

future_test_plan.name: Artifact-risk check
future_test_plan.required_result: Constant deltas across sweep cells trigger artifact-risk warning.

future_test_plan.name: Claim boundary check
future_test_plan.required_result: No report claims validation, empirical support, real biological applicability, or manuscript readiness.

go_for_future_code_branch: No new tag is created for documentation-only planning artifacts.
Implementation branch is separate from documentation branches.
no_go_conditions: Any real biological semantics are introduced.
Any manuscript readiness claim is introduced.
Any null-control leakage is accepted as harmless.
Any constant signal is treated as strong evidence without artifact-risk reporting.
Any VF-H1, VF-H3, or VF-H4 upgrade is attempted without separate evidence.

implementation_goal: Allow a clean safe abstract toy parameter sweep without expanding claims or introducing real biological meaning.

implementation_phases.future_acceptance_gate: Document exact validation functions before editing them.
implementation_phases.name: Inspect current engine validation boundary
implementation_phases.purpose: Identify where fixed v9.1 default-value validation blocks safe abstract toy sweep values.

implementation_phases.future_acceptance_gate: Every sweep parameter has allowed values, allowed role, and forbidden interpretation.
implementation_phases.name: Design SafeToySweepProfile structure
implementation_phases.purpose: Define bounded safe abstract toy parameter registry without biological semantics.

implementation_phases.future_acceptance_gate: Default v9.1 config still validates exactly, and safe sweep configs validate through a separate profile.
implementation_phases.name: Separate default config validation from sweep profile validation
implementation_phases.purpose: Allow declared safe sweep profiles without pretending they are v9.1 default configs.

implementation_phases.future_acceptance_gate: Identical-variant comparisons produce zero ledger_effect_size delta.
implementation_phases.name: Add mandatory null-control templates
implementation_phases.purpose: Make null-control leakage checks first-class and unavoidable.

implementation_phases.future_acceptance_gate: Reports include distinct delta count, min, max, mean, standard deviation, and artifact-risk verdict.
implementation_phases.name: Add artifact-risk reporting
implementation_phases.purpose: Detect mechanically fixed signal patterns such as constant 3.0 deltas.

implementation_phases.future_acceptance_gate: A separate code branch must be opened before any engine or experiment file changes.
implementation_phases.name: Run future safe sweep only after implementation branch
implementation_phases.purpose: Prevent implementation leakage into the planning artifact.

planned_files_to_consider.allowed_change: separate fixed default validation from safe sweep profile validation
add future safe abstract toy sweep experiment only after implementation branch opens
add future report writer with artifact-risk and null-control reporting only after implementation branch opens
planned_files_to_consider.role: future safe sweep report writer location

planned_files_to_consider.allowed_change: this plan may write documentation outputs only
